title: BedFallback
description: If your bed is broken, your spawn point is your previous bed
body:
# Bed Fallback

A simple utility mod to help in modpacks or servers, to avoid getting spawned back at world spawn, but rather keep track of old spawn points if the beds still exist.

## Function
When you break a bed you had as spawn, but the bed you had as previous spawn is still there, the last available bed you had set as spawn will automatically be your spawn again.

Server config option which sets maximum known fallback beds. Default is 3.

## Wiki

Check out the [wiki](https://github.com/magnushjensen/bed-fallback/wiki) for detailed documentation.

If you think anything is missing from the wiki that is unclear, send a message in the discord or open an [improve documentation issue](https://github.com/MagnusHJensen/bed-fallback/issues/new?template=3.Improve_docs.md).

## Roadmap
